character.bio: An operative belonging to a certain intelligence organization. A cold, hard realist. She complements her fighting abilities using a number of gadgets hidden in her outfit.

cviper_standing_light_punch_l.note: Can be rapid canceledCan be canceled into High Jump

cviper_standing_light_kick_l.note: Can be canceled into High Jump

cviper_standing_medium_punch_m.note: Can be canceled into High Jump

cviper_standing_medium_kick_m.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack missesCan be canceled into High Jump

cviper_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Can be canceled into High Jump

cviper_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Produces a ground bound during a mid-air hitAdds +19 frames of advantage on a Punish CounterCan be canceled into High Jump

cviper_crouching_light_punch_l.note: Can be rapid canceledCan be canceled into High Jump

cviper_crouching_light_kick_l.note: Can be rapid canceledCan be canceled into High Jump

cviper_crouching_medium_punch_m.note: Can be canceled into High Jump

cviper_crouching_medium_kick_m.note: Can be canceled into High Jump

cviper_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Can be canceled into High JumpForces the opponent into a standing position

cviper_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

cviper_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

cviper_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Produces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

cviper_high_jump_forward.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.Considered airborne from frames 7 - 46Can be canceled into a special move between frames 2 - 5

cviper_high_jump_neutral.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.Considered airborne from frames 7 - 46Can be canceled into a special move between frames 2 - 5

cviper_l_thunder_dash_l.note: Can transition into Feint on frame 12Can transition into follow-up attack on frame 20 on either hit or block

cviper_m_thunder_dash_m.note: Can transition into Feint on frame 8Can transition into follow-up attack on frame 19 on either hit or block

cviper_h_thunder_dash_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 9 - 31Can transition into Feint on frame 6Can transition into follow-up attack on frame 17 on either hit or block

cviper_l_tracer_combination.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.

cviper_m_tracer_combination.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.Produces a ground bound during a mid-air hit

cviper_h_tracer_combination.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.

cviper_l_burning_kick_l.note: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 34Can transition into Knuckled Pursuit or Double Burn between frames 27 - 29Juggle state time is extended when attack lands as a Punish Counter.

cviper_m_burning_kick_m.note: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 36Can transition into Knuckled Pursuit or Double Burn between frames 29 - 31Juggle state time is extended when attack lands as a Punish Counter.

cviper_h_burning_kick_h.note: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 38Can transition into Knuckled Pursuit or Double Burn between frames 31 - 33Juggle state time is extended when attack lands as a Punish Counter.

cviper_knuckled_pursuit.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.

cviper_double_burn.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.

cviper_l_aerial_burning_kick.level: (During a neutral or forward jump)  L
cviper_l_aerial_burning_kick.input: (During a neutral or forward jump) ↓↘→ + LK
cviper_l_aerial_burning_kick.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesRecovery on block changes depending on the height of the attack when it is blockedAdds 1 frame to landing recovery when the attack leaps over the opponent and they block itAdds 8 frame to landing recovery when the attack leaps over the opponent and misses

cviper_m_aerial_burning_kick.level: (During a neutral or forward jump)  M
cviper_m_aerial_burning_kick.input: (During a neutral or forward jump) ↓↘→ + MK
cviper_m_aerial_burning_kick.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesRecovery on block changes depending on the height of the attack when it is blockedAdds 1 frame to landing recovery when the attack leaps over the opponent and they block itAdds 8 frame to landing recovery when the attack leaps over the opponent and misses

cviper_h_aerial_burning_kick.level: (During a neutral or forward jump)  H
cviper_h_aerial_burning_kick.input: (During a neutral or forward jump) ↓↘→ + HK
cviper_h_aerial_burning_kick.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesRecovery on block changes depending on the height of the attack when it is blockedAdds 1 frame to landing recovery when the attack leaps over the opponent and they block itAdds 8 frame to landing recovery when the attack leaps over the opponent and misses

cviper_od_aerial_burning_kick.input: (During a neutral or forward jump) ↓↘→ + K
cviper_od_aerial_burning_kick.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesRecovery on block changes depending on the height of the attack when it is blockedAdds 8 frame to landing recovery when the attack leaps over the opponent and misses

cviper_l_seismic_hammer_l.note: Can transition into Feint on frame 11Can be canceled into High Jump

cviper_m_seismic_hammer_m.note: Can transition into Feint on frame 11Can be canceled into High Jump

cviper_h_seismic_hammer_h.note: Can transition into Feint on frame 11Can be canceled into High Jump

cviper_od_seismic_hammer.note: Can be canceled into High Jump

cviper_focus_force_lv1.note: Gains full body armor properties to absorb 1 hit from frames 6 - 13, hold version extends this window until frame 59When a strike-based attack hits the armor hitbox, the technique automatically counterattacksCan be canceled into a forward dash between frames 11 - 13, hold version extends this window until frame 59Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 20 frames and then releasedChanges to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 59 framesJuggle state time is extended when attack lands as a Punish Counter.

cviper_focus_force_lv2.note: Produces a crumple stun on Punish Counter

cviper_focus_force_lv3.note: Causes a crumple stun on hit

cviper_od_focus_force_lv1.note: Gains full body armor properties to absorb 1 hit from frames 3 - 10, hold version extends this window until frame 57When a strike-based attack hits the armor hitbox, the technique automatically counterattacksCan be canceled into a forward dash between frames 8 - 10, hold version extends this window until frame 57Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 20 frames and then releasedChanges to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 57 framesJuggle state time is extended when attack lands as a Punish Counter.

cviper_od_focus_force_lv2.note: Produces a crumple stun on Punish Counter

cviper_od_focus_force_lv3.note: Causes a crumple stun on hit

cviper_focus_force_forward_dash.note: Always in Punish Counter state during execution.

cviper_sa1_limit_decoupler.note: Invincible to strikes and throws between frames 1 - 11Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 12 - 20Considered airborne from frames 12 - 42Adds a timer set to 700 frames, during this time Viper can perform follow-up attacks and High Jumps without consuming any Drive (During Burnout the timer is consumed, and follow-up attacks and High Jumps can be performed)Recovers 3000 Drive Gauge when follow-up attack hits while the timer is activeValues do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish CounterThe minimum guaranteed damage is 30%

cviper_sa2_mission_complete.note: Completely invincible on frames 1 - 10Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

cviper_sa3_hard_luck_rejector.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
cviper_sa3_hard_luck_rejector.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + K
cviper_sa3_hard_luck_rejector.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 13The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

cviper_ca_hard_luck_rejector.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
cviper_ca_hard_luck_rejector.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + K
cviper_ca_hard_luck_rejector.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 13The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

cviper_high_impulse.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

cviper_thunder_cradle.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

cviper_drive_impact_viper_cannon.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks between frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Juggle state time is increased if the opponent is in the air- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

cviper_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
cviper_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
cviper_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible between frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

cviper_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible between frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

cviper_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
cviper_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
cviper_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution

cviper_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

cviper_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occursThe player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

cviper_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

cviper_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
cviper_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
